Property.Name: RenderTransform
Property.Value: CompositeTransform( Name=HorizontalThumbTransform ScaleX=1 ScaleY=0.125 TranslateX=0 TranslateY=-2 )

Property.Name: RenderTransform
Property.Value: CompositeTransform( Name=VerticalThumbTransform ScaleX=0.125 ScaleY=1 TranslateX=-2 TranslateY=0 )
